detection.cv_note: GroupKFold by (model, dataset, seed); per-fold group z-score (train-only); grid search on fold-0 train with 3-fold inner CV; NaN preserved for XGBoost (union mode), 0-filled for LR/SVM/EasyEnsemble

categorization.cv_note: GroupKFold by (model, dataset, seed); per-fold group z-score (train-only); grid search on fold-0 train with 3-fold inner CV; NaN preserved for XGBoost (union mode), 0-filled for LR/SVM/EasyEnsemble

stable_rules_across_folds: abs_residual_cos_mean > Q0 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb > Q3 AND abs_h1_delta_norm_mean <= Q3 AND abs_head_similarity_mean <= Q2 => embedding
abs_residual_cos_mean > Q0 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb > Q3 AND abs_h1_delta_norm_mean <= Q3 AND abs_head_similarity_mean > Q2 => positional
abs_residual_cos_mean > Q0 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb <= Q3 AND abs_head_similarity_max <= Q0 AND abs_ln_mean_abs_mean <= Q0 => positional
abs_residual_cos_mean > Q0 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb <= Q3 AND abs_head_similarity_max <= Q0 AND abs_ln_mean_abs_mean > Q0 => kernel

edges.rule: abs_residual_cos_mean > Q0 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb > Q3 AND abs_h1_delta_norm_mean <= Q3 AND abs_head_similarity_mean <= Q2 => embedding
abs_residual_cos_mean > Q0 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb > Q3 AND abs_h1_delta_norm_mean <= Q3 AND abs_head_similarity_mean > Q2 => positional
abs_residual_cos_mean > Q0 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb <= Q3 AND abs_head_similarity_max <= Q0 AND abs_ln_mean_abs_mean <= Q0 => positional
abs_residual_cos_mean > Q0 AND abs_peak_mem_alloc_mb <= Q3 AND abs_head_similarity_max <= Q0 AND abs_ln_mean_abs_mean > Q0 => kernel
